context.scale: 10k MAU now, 500k projected; Auth0 cost steepens above ~200k MAU
context.team_capability_and_fit: strong web team; no identity engineer; wants to own product surface, not auth internals
context.commodity_or_core: mostly commodity; enterprise SAML may be a differentiated slice
context.constraints: SOC 2, GDPR, likely SAML for enterprise

tier_search.buy: Auth0 viable but per-MAU cost steepens above 200k
tier_search.build: small layer over next-auth callbacks for enterprise SSO only

evidence_matrix.reliability: 5M weekly downloads; no critical CVE in 2 years
evidence_matrix.adaptability: Medium; adapters cover OAuth, passkeys, SAML

why_this_wins: next-auth is proven at scale, near-zero TCO, and one week to production; a small BUILD layer covers enterprise SSO only when the first enterprise customer asks for it.
re_evaluation_trigger: 100k MAU, first enterprise SSO request, or any next-auth security incident
missing_information: growth curve for cost projection; SSO timing
